company_name: Hanmi Semiconductor HBM equipment early-capture case
notes: Hanmi is a structural early-capture candidate, but unconfirmed customer reports are capped until binding contracts appear.

company_name: Samsung E&A Fadhili EPC Stage 2 strong case
notes: Samsung E&A has contract amount and customer evidence, but EPC margin and cash conversion decide Stage 3.

company_name: Samsung SDS KKR CB AI cloud Stage 2 not Green
notes: Samsung SDS gets Stage 2 strategic validation, but CB dilution and missing AI ARR/FCF block Green.

company_name: Alteogen Keytruda SC royalty platform candidate
notes: Alteogen can be Stage 2/3 candidate after royalty/adoption backfill; expectation-only periods need 4B monitoring.

company_name: Pinkfong IP IPO price-path not Stage 3
notes: Pinkfong has strong Stage 2 IP price-path, but IPO pop and one-hit risk block Stage 3 until multi-IP OPM/FCF are proven.

company_name: Samsung SDI ESS LFP contract Stage 2 strong
notes: Samsung SDI ESS is Stage 2 strong, but customer, utilization, OPM, and FCF are needed before Green.

company_name: KOGAS Daesung Energy East Sea gas event
notes: The East Sea gas event is the canonical +30% price-path that remains Stage 1/4B-watch before commerciality.

company_name: Kia hybrid localization with SDV delay EV target cut
notes: Kia localization evidence is useful, but SDV delay, EV target cut, and capex pressure are 4C-watch fields.
Jeju Air is a hard 4C example where safety and trust override travel recovery.

company_name: NAVER-Dunamu digital asset equity value cap
notes: Dunamu stake value is Stage 2 validation, not listed-company Green until EPS/FCF linkage and security/regulation are clean.

company_name: OCI SpaceX media report HD Hyundai Mipo LOI LG Chem non-binding cap
notes: Media report, LOI, and non-binding evidence cannot become Stage 3 until binding contract details are parsed.

company_name: Korea freight commodity disease cycle basket
notes: Cycle success can be real, but R13 caps it below structural Green until durability is proven.

company_name: NAVER-LY LINE data leak operational trust watch
notes: Data leak and regulatory pressure are operational trust hard-review fields for platform candidates.

company_name: Kakao HYBE Krafton legal governance watch
notes: Legal and governance overhang can block otherwise good platform/content candidates.
Policy, political, and geopolitical shocks are market overlays, not company Green evidence.
